ksa_text: Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis, correlation analysis, anomaly detection, and translating EDA findings into modeling decisions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques
Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-002 (AI, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4321 is insufficient to establish relevance to survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.432, ddat=0.423, dcwf=0.412) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4321 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-S-002 (composite 0.4321) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4321 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Survey Researcher at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4321 is not a standard requirement for Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4321, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
